name: Chocolate Swirl Cheesecake 2
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Cream cheese, soft 8 oz size
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine chocolate chips and 3/4 cup sugar over hot (not boiling) water; heat until chips melt and mixture is smooth. Remove from heat; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine Graham-cracker crumbs, 2 tablespoons sugar, and melted butter; mix well. Pat firmly into the bottom and 1/2 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until light and creamy. Gradually beat in 3/4 cup sugar. Mix sour cream and vanilla extract. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Divide batter into two bowls. Stir melted chocolate mixture into the first half. Pour into crumb-lined pan; spread evenly. Cover with plain batter.
5. With a knife, swirl plain batter with chocolate batter to marbleize. Bake for 50 minutes or until a few wobbly lines appear in the center when tapped. Cool at room temperature; refrigerate.
